since_last: 72% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.59%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 72% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.50% · BTC -2.18% · Gold +1.17% · Nasdaq100 +1.27%. 72% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.59%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.59%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +21.51%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +21.51%, AMBA +13.70%, CEVA +7.53%, MRVL +6.83%, KLAC +6.27%. Laggards: TTD -4.77%, DLR -4.37%, HON -3.50%, EQIX -2.59%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.63% at $166.86
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
